architecture.summary: Shell hook + LLM detector + TypeScript types + config schema. suggestOnly flag flip, LSP guard addition. Two repos: specweave and vskill.

integrations.summary: N/A - internal tooling change, no external integrations. LLM detector uses Haiku but no integration changes needed.

ui-ux.summary: CLI-only. Suggestions shown once per session with plugin name, reason, and install command. No degraded mode for LSP.

performance.summary: N/A - config flag changes only, no performance impact.

security.summary: This IS a security/consent feature. Prevents unwanted code installation. --force --yes flags retained for explicit opt-in scenarios only.

edge-cases.summary: Backward compat: all existing projects get new default. Force flags kept for CI. Phantom plugins marked not-yet-available in LLM prompt (not removed from catalog).
